title: Spandam’s Frame-Up
description: Young Franky’s recklessness and Tom’s faith in building ships reveal why the sea train and blueprints matter so much.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Franky, Tom, Iceburg, Spandam. Young Franky’s recklessness and Tom’s faith in building ships reveal why the sea train and blueprints matter so much.

dialogue.speaker: Tom
dialogue.text: This incident is of the utmost secrecy.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: It's not something you can touch!!!

summary: Young Franky’s recklessness and Tom’s faith in building ships reveal why the sea train and blueprints matter so much.
